Explore Our Programs

Specialized, placement-focused certificate programs that turn graduates into job-ready retail bankers.

Home / Programs

Certificate in Banking and Financial Services (CBFS)

Certificate in Banking & Financial Services. A 3-month online training program focused on making you job-ready with banking skills, certifications, and placement assistance.

Learn More Enquire Now

Probationary Officer's Program

PO Program with Utkarsh Small Finance Bank. A premium 1-year program with confirmed recruitment before training, combining classroom learning, paid internship, and on-the-job training.

Learn More Enquire Now

HTD Model with DCB Bank

Hire-Train-Deploy Model. A fast-track entry into banking where you get hired first, trained for 15 days offline, and then deployed as a Customer Service Manager.

Learn More Enquire Now

Equitas IGNITE Program

Equitas Small Finance Bank IGNITE Program. A short 2-week residential program that prepares you for a Business Development Officer role with full fee refund after 12 months.

Learn More Enquire Now

Aurix Bankers Program

Aurix Program with AU Small Finance Bank. A 3-month career launchpad combining 1 month of intensive online training and a 2-month paid local branch internship, leading to a Bank Officer placement.

Learn More Enquire Now

Program Highlights

Certificate in Banking & Financial Services (CBFS)

A job-ready certificate course designed for fresh graduates to prepare them as Smart Bankers for retail banking portfolios.

  • Duration: 3 Months (Online mode)
  • Eligibility: Graduation with min. 50% marks in 10th, 12th & Graduation, aged 21-27 years.
  • Salary Package: ₹ 2.4 to 3.5 LPA
  • Training Highlights: Finacle core banking software training, Advanced Excel, NISM VA MF exam prep, and ex-banker mock interview sessions.
  • Course Fee: ₹ 69,900 (Installment and 0% interest loan options available).
View Detailed Course Info

Probationary Officer's Program (Utkarsh SFB)

A premium residential program ensuring confirmed recruitment at Utkarsh Small Finance Bank before your training begins.

  • Duration: 12 Months (4 months classroom at Baddi University + 2 months internship with ₹10,000/mo stipend + 6 months on-the-job training with ₹16,000/mo stipend).
  • Eligibility: Regular graduation or postgraduation with min. 50% marks, aged below 27 years.
  • Designation & CTC: Assistant Manager-II (AM-II) with a starting package of ₹ 5.0 LPA.
  • Training Highlights: UGC-approved ACBFS certificate from Sharda University, residential campus, hands-on branch operation training.
  • Course Fee: ₹ 2.65 Lacs (Education loan facility from Utkarsh Bank available).
View Detailed Course Info

HTD Model with DCB Bank

A fast-track Hire-Train-Deploy (HTD) program where you are interviewed and selected first by DCB Bank before training.

  • Duration: 15 Days (Offline classroom training).
  • Eligibility: Regular graduation with min. 50% marks, aged below 25 years.
  • Designation & CTC: Customer Service Manager with an assured salary of ₹ 3.5 - 4.5 LPA.
  • Training Highlights: Short-term role-specific training conducted by senior ex-bankers in Mohali, Noida, Bhubaneshwar, or Jodhpur.
  • Course Fee: ₹ 40,000 + GST (payable only after final selection by the bank).
View Detailed Course Info

Equitas SFB IGNITE Program

A short, job-assured residential carrier launchpad in collaboration with Equitas Small Finance Bank.

  • Duration: 2 Weeks (Residential training at Baddi University).
  • Eligibility: Graduation with 50%+ marks in any degree, aged 26 years and below.
  • Designation & CTC: Business Development Officer (BDO) with a starting package of ₹ 3.5 LPA + incentives.
  • Training Highlights: Job offer letter issued before training, intensive sales and customer engagement strategies, ex-banker mentorship.
  • Course Fee: ₹ 42,000 + GST (Full fee is refunded as a performance bonus after 12 months of service).
View Detailed Course Info

Aurix Bankers Program (AU Small Finance Bank)

A job-assured training and placement program in collaboration with AU Small Finance Bank, grooming fresh graduates into Bank Officers.

  • Duration: 3 Months (1 Month online training + 2 Months paid branch internship).
  • Eligibility: Graduation in any stream with min. 50% marks, aged below 28 years.
  • Designation & CTC: Bank Officer with a starting package of ₹ 3.5 LPA + Performance Incentives.
  • Training Highlights: 1-month online foundation training, Finacle bank software training, customer service delivery, and a 2-month paid local branch internship with ₹5,000/mo stipend.
  • Course Fee: ₹ 40,000 (INR 22,000 admission fee + INR 18,000 remaining fee payable post-placement).
View Detailed Course Info
